# thoth_approvals (Data Source)

Reads approval queue records with optional status and pagination filters.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `page` (Number) Page number (1-based).
- `per_page` (Number) Items per page.
- `status` (String) Filter by approval status (pending, approved, denied).

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Approval rows as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total matching approvals.
